feed.title: SAP Community - Cloud Integration
feed.subtitle: Cloud Integration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing Integration Capability with SAP EWM 9.5
entry.content: Standard SAP DM integration with EWM is capable of supporting the minimum version of SAP S/4HANA 2021 and above (both embedded EWM and Decentralized EWM on S/4HANA). Is there any note to refer to that SAP DM supports integration with EWM 9.5?

entry.title: Is it possible to configure a Static IP for the EDI Exchange in the CPI?
entry.content:
Hi everybody,
anyone has an idea, whether it is possible get a static IP for sending EDI-Message in the CPI?
Background of the Question is the fact that we are exchanging EDIFACT Message with Partners, which have a quite strict Firewall. And if our IP-Adress or IP-Adress-Range isn’t whitelisted on there side, our Message are getting rejected.

Our goal is to send EDIFACT messages like an invoice or an order response via the CPI with an AS2 Connector with a static IP-Adress or static IP-Adress-Range.

Thanks
Tobias

entry.title: Transfer objects created in Integration Suite to Cloud Integration NEO. (Message-type and data-type)
entry.content:
Hi everyone !

    I'm working on a project migrating SAP PI/PO to Cloud Integration NEO (the migration from NEO to Cloud Foundry will be next year). To perform the migration using the migration tool, following the instructions provided by SAP, we created a BTP Trial account and imported all the objects from PI/PO. After the migration, I'm transferring the objects and iFlows to BTP NEO (Cloud Integration). However, Cloud Integration NEO doesn't have the option to import Data-Types or Message-Types that were created during the migration in the Integration Suite of the Trial account. My question is: has anyone done this transfer from Integration Suite to Cloud Integration NEO before? How do I transfer the data-types and message-types to NEO? And if I have to create them manually in NEO, how do I create these objects in their iFlows on Cloud Integration NEO ?

entry.title: SAP CPI - json value characater gets escaped when convert to xml
entry.content:
I have a converter which convert json to xml. 

In my json I have a field which has the '&' character  in the value, like this: 

"nextPageLink":"/records?pageNumber=2&pageSize=100"

after CPI Json to xml convert it to xml, the value of the nextPageLink was converted as:

records?pageNumber=2&pageSize=100.

The '&'  is escaped as & , how can I avoid this?

entry.title: Table ARFCRSTATE line 0 out of range: table is empty - SAP S4 to Biztalk 2016
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While Connecting from SAP S4 Cloud to MS Biztalk 2016 it is failing with below error. Totally stucked up with this error for few weeks. SAP states to uplift SAP NCO connector to 3.1.6 it doesn't really help.

 

Table ARFCRSTATE line 0 out of range: table is empty - Stucked in SM58

Latest Update from SAP- Really issue is strange and fishy!!!

Logs:

 

MS REPLY:

 

 

 

 

Thanks and Regards,

Rajesh PS

entry.title: Handling large file transfers (1GB+) in BTP-Integration Suite !
entry.content:
We are currently evaluating the migration of high-volume 'File-to-File' pass-through scenarios (exceeding 1GB) from SAP PI/PO to SAP BTP Integration Suite. While this is currently stable in our legacy environment, we need to ensure the Cloud Integration architecture can handle similar loads without memory bottlenecks.
when we try the same requirement in CPI ,it’s getting failed to read the file .

Any recommendations would be appreciated,thank you

-regards ,Bhaskar

Cloud Integration

entry.title: Connection to IXOS Server from CPI - Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My requirement is to store the PDF files into IXOS server which is an opentext server for archiving the files and once we send any file we will get a archive id and it should be updated in S4HANA . Could anyone provide inputs on how to establish connection to IXOS server i mean how to store files in IXOS server from CPI whether it is API based push or SFTP based push. 

 

Regards,

Pavan Kalyan Racha

entry.title: Provide values for node created with CreateIf in CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

I've some rather confusing issue in CPI.

I'm creating a node "ContactComms" via createIf based on some conditions. I have 7 values in the queue for the createIf, one is "true" and is resulting in a node as expected.

Within node "ContactComms", there is a tag "Value". Although number of values provided in the queue for this is the same, I never get a value in "Value".

The result has no tag "value". I would expect one with mail ab-email@gmail.com

I am happy for any hints on this issues. Thank you very much!

Harry

 

EDIT: As I wrote, I came to the conclusion. For value, "splitByValue" is the right function to use instead of "removeContext"

entry.title: Exploring Middleware Options for SAP Public Cloud to OFTP2 Integration
entry.content:
HI SAP Friends.

Exploring Middleware Options for SAP Public Cloud to OFTP2 Integration

In one of our current engagements with a Europe-based client, we are managing a business scenario involving approximately 35 interfaces. These interfaces are responsible for integrating the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system with an OFTP2 adapter, currently facilitated through SEEBURGER.

As part of our evaluation, we are exploring alternative solutions—either within the SAP ecosystem or through third-party applications—that can provide similar OFTP2 communication capabilities as SEEBURGER. The objective is to identify a scalable, secure, and cost-effective middleware solution that can efficiently handle multiple interfaces while ensuring compliance with OFTP2 standards.

We are particularly interested in solutions that offer:

  • Seamless integration with SAP Public Cloud
  • Native or supported OFTP2 capabilities
  • Strong monitoring and error-handling features
  • Flexibility to scale across multiple interfaces

If you have experience with similar integration scenarios or can recommend suitable alternatives, your insights would be highly valuable.

entry.title: CPI SOAP error - HTTP response '400: Bad Request'
entry.content:
Hi,

When an external SOAP service is called via SOAP UI with proper request payload, we get expected response, but when we use the same request payload to call the same Service via SAP CPI, I get the below error

org.apache.cxf.interceptor.Fault: Could not send Message., cause: org.apache.cxf.transport.http.HTTPException: HTTP response '400: Bad Request. Bad Request' when communicating with URL

It was working fine until 06/03/2026. The SOAP vendor doesn't update anything, so I suspect SAP has changed something.

Has anyone got this error before?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: Failed to fetch oAuth token from IFlow
entry.content:
Hi CPI Experts,

I am trying to fetch a set of data using IFlow from an api which is publically available and secured with oAuth.
I have created a security material with the following details:

Then I am using this in the IFlow as 

 

When I trigger the IFlow, fetching auth token fails with the error:

com.google.common.util.concurrent.UncheckedExecutionException: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: Exception occured while fetching OAuth Token. Reason: mysite.com: Name or service not known, cause: java.net.UnknownHostException: mysite.com: Name or service not known

 

I have tested the API and credential from Bruno and it is working, which indicates that there is no issue with the application server.

Any inputs are much appreciated.
Thanks.

entry.title: Strengthen Kafka integration
entry.content:
Hello community!

For an international customer, I’m looking for insights to strengthen the integration with Kafka, in an EDA context.

I’m specifically looking for these topics

  • Private Link Architecture. B2B VPN tunnel, Cloud Connector, … ?
  • Multiple event types on a single topic
  • Better visibility on errors, especially when multiple schema rules are violated
  • Offset commit mechanism
  • AVRO schema support
  • Retry behavior and flexible strategy

Yes, I know there is Advanced Event Mesh. But the choice for Kafka was made a long time ago. Currently, we do not use the native Kafka adapter within the Integration Suite.

I’m thus looking for insights within the Integration Suite context to strengthen our current integration. To make it more robust, safe and futureproof.

Looking forward to your feedback!

Thanks.
Dimitri

entry.title: integration of SAP Public Cloud with AMAZON
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

Can you explain the steps for Integrating SAP public Cloud and AMAZON for flowing of Sales and Stock Data . 

Thanks & Regards  

Tapas

entry.title: Integration btw SAP SuccessFactors to SAP Ariba for user master data flow ..
entry.content:
need to Integrate  Success factors to SAP Ariba for  User master data integration as if the user is created in SF that can automatically be created in Ariba....what architecture we are thinking is  

Success Factors->SFTP->CPI->CIG->Ariba Buying/Sourcing.

Can anyone suggest will this work or not and if there is any other approach for the same requirement. and what actions mapping will be required from CIG, Ariba end for the requires integration.

entry.title: Unable to set property from an XML using the XPath.
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

I am unable to set a property using an XPATH from the XML Payload.

Following is the XML payload.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" standalone="yes"?>
<entry xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom"
xmlns:m="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata"
xmlns:d="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices"
xml:base="https://api41preview.sapsf.com/odata/v2/">
<content type="application/xml">hello</content>
<d:fileExtension>txt</d:fileExtension>
</entry>

Note that I have simplified this payload eliminating all the other nodes so as to focus on the question at hand. 

Following is the sample I-flow I created to explain the issue.

In Content Modifier 1 I have hardcoded the body with the Payload

In Content Modifier 2 I am setting the Property using the Xpath as follows

Action Name Type Data Type Value

ActionNameTypeData TypeValue

Create

fileExtension

XPath

java.lang.String

/entry/d:fileExtension/text()

In Content Modifier 3 I am checking if the Property is set. This is where I find that the property is not getting set.

I have confirmed that the XPATH is correct testing it wit other tools.

I have also included the namespaces d and m on the Runtime Configuration Tab on the Integration Flow as follows

entry.title: Unable to modify API URL after completing RTI Connectivity configuration (CIAIS scenario)
entry.content:
I have completed all configuration steps for CIAIS following the scenario “Configuring RTI Connectivity in SAP IBP”.

During the setup of the communication with SAP IBP, the API URL field was configured incorrectly.

Incorrect URL entered:
https://my308167.scmibp1.ondemand.com

Correct URL should be:
https://my308167-api.scmibp1.ondemand.com

After completing the configuration, the task was marked as Completed, and I am currently unable to reopen or edit the step to correct the API URL.

Additionally, all subsequent steps in the scenario were executed using this incorrect configuration

entry.title: Establish Connection between SAP SF and 3rd Party SFTP Host
entry.content: How to Establish Connection between SAP SF and 3rd Party SFTP Host

entry.title: Odata V4 sales order - Impossible to post item in CPI
entry.content:
I've succeed to post an item by using Client SAP Gateway tool like you can see in the screen below.

But impossible to translate it in CPI.

I've tried several options to do the same as in Gateway but impossible. It's quite frustating.

If you have idea to acheive the post by CPI.

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Request for Deletion of Old Message Locks in CPI
entry.content:
We are observing a large number of old message locks in our SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI) tenant under Manage Message Locks. These entries are quite old (from 2023–2024) and are no longer required.

Due to this accumulation, we would like to clean up the system and improve performance/monitoring efficiency.

entry.title: How to extract Equipment Type assigned to Load Requisitions from SAP IBP via ODATA API
entry.content:
Hello Community Members,

We are trying to extract information relevant to SAP IBP's Transportation Load Building Load Requisitions. We need to extract the Load Requisition Orders and Equipment type assigned to each load in an excel/CSV file.

We tried exploring the various APIs available such as:

https://api.sap.com/api/IBP_Purchasing_RAP_ODataService/overview

https://api.sap.com/api/IBP_Snapshot_RAP_ODataService/overview

https://api.sap.com/package/IBPAPIDetailedPeggingService/odatav4

https://api.sap.com/api/IBP_Keyfigure_ODataService/overview (This is only available for Time Series)

 

Can you help us in identifying any API that can be used to extract Equipment Type assigned to Load Requisitions from SAP IBP? or if the OBP Data Sources like STD_MALAMOT_EQUOM can be accesses via any APIs?

Thanks,
